qa_pairs.question: What kind of supercomputer was Helios?
qa_pairs.answer: Helios was a supercomputer made up of Graphics Processing Unit (GPGPU) nodes.

qa_pairs.question: Where was Helios installed?
qa_pairs.answer: It was installed at Université Laval's computing centre.

qa_pairs.question: When was Helios installed?
qa_pairs.answer: Helios was installed in the spring of 2014.

qa_pairs.question: When was interactive access to Helios discontinued?
qa_pairs.answer: Interactive access to Helios was discontinued on October 26, 2022.

qa_pairs.question: Why was interactive access to Helios stopped?
qa_pairs.answer: It was stopped in anticipation of its decommissioning.

qa_pairs.question: How can users extract data from Helios?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can extract data using the Globus drop-off point.
